description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a prominent gable roof and a clean, geometric design. The front facade features large horizontal windows and a wooden accent beam, while the rear includes a spacious outdoor pool area with a patterned deck. The house is primarily white with dark and wooden trim, and the structure is elevated above a striped ground surface, possibly representing a stylized lawn or driveway. The left side of the house is mostly solid, with minimal window openings, while the right side includes a covered carport or patio area. The pool is rectangular and bordered by a distinctive, angular frame, adding to the contemporary aesthetic. The overall design emphasizes open, horizontal lines and a minimalist approach.
description: A modern two-story house with a gable roof, large horizontal windows, and a backyard pool with a patterned deck. The exterior is white with dark and wooden accents, featuring clean, geometric lines.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large horizontal windows, wooden accent beam, and the pool area extending to the left.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the solid wall with minimal windows and the extension of the pool and striped ground surface.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the gable roof, the back of the house with fewer windows, and the pool area in the foreground.
description_view_3: Right side view focusing on the pool's angular border, striped ground, and a covered carport or patio area attached to the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large horizontal windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a wide door, wooden accent beam, steps leading up, and a small overhang
